DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS9-L1-300650-HSVPA910-CSR-LAT-01 • Grade 9 HS Visual & Performing Arts: Theatre 9-10 • Performance Choices

The Stopped Hands

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students mainly trying to figure out?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the girl think the abuela is remembering something instead of being confused?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy realize by the end of the conversation?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Find the part where the boy says what he sees in the panel. Then find the part where the girl says what she sees in the same panel.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  NCAS TH:Cr3.1.HSI.b  |  HS Theatre 9-10: Performance Choices
